content.rendered:
Redeemers Ministries Virtual Learning Centre

Christ the Redeemer’s Ministries Virtual Learning Centre herein referred to as “CRM-VLC” is an e-learning portal that provides on-line or blended learning courses to equip and empower open learner’s subscribers globally.

Many organisations find their learning and knowledge management programs are most effectively delivered in a blended format i.e in a combination of online and instructor led training (ILT). A blended approach can also be more easily adapted for different learning styles and situations.

CRM-VLC’s open approach to Virtual Classrooms provides the ultimate flexibility, enabling you to choose multiple live eLearning providers or the best solution for your specific needs. This open approach also allows you the flexibility to change vendors as needed, and still maintain seamless integration with the CRM-VLC e-Learning Suite.

CRM-VLC can integrate most of the popular Virtual Classroom products such as Centra, Interwise, Microsoft Live Meeting and WebEx into the CRM-VLC environment. The level of integration varies depending on customer needs but can include single sign-on integration, access to live events from within Learning Objects, capture of test and attendance information from a live event, access to an individual’s live event schedule and available recorded events and automatic synchronization of user and password information.

Virtual Classroom events (recorded or upcoming) can be stored as Learning Objects or embedded within Learning Objects, providing maximum flexibility for implementation within CRM-VLC environment.

Benefits

• Offers a cost effective way of tutor delivery

• Supports collaborative and peer to peer learning

• Allows you maximum flexibility in designing and delivering learning programs

• Enhances the user’s learning experience.

CRM-VLC QuickValue

CRM-VLC’s QuickValue ensures the successful delivery of every project. Developed using industry best practice and over 20 years’ experience delivering successful solutions to customers, QuickValue enables rapid delivery with guaranteed results. So confident are our teams in our proven delivery experience that we are happy to offer Fixed Price on projects.

Solution Consultants   CRM-VLC’s teams of Solution Consultants have the breadth and depth of technical experience in delivering solutions that ensures the realization of project benefits. Their industry knowledge, backed with an innovative and flexible approach to delivering solutions that address your business issues means they deliver faster and more profitable solutions.

CRM-VLC SUITES INCLUDES BUT NOT LIMITED TO:

· CRM–VLC for Character Education

· CRM-VLC for career counselling and guidance

· CRM-VLC for WAEC, NECO, JAMB Preparation Platform

· CRM-VLC for Online Foreign Language (French, German, Chinese, Italian & Spanish)

· CRM-VLC for Learning & Certification such as Entrepreneurship and ICT etc.

· CRM-VLC for Educational Institutions such as Run-Consult & Unilag-Consult etc

· CRM-VLC for Capacity building for Christians planning to Live or Work Abroad such as eMissionaries ( Terms & Conditions Apply)

· CRM-VLC Reference Library / Online Library
